name: Aberration herbeirufen
materials: Ein eingelegtes Tentakel und ein Augapfel in einer Viole mit einem Platinintarsie im Wert von mindestens 400GM

name: Ansteckung
desc: Bei einem fehlgeschlagenem KON-Rettungswurf, erleidet das Ziel, 11d8 nekrotischen Schaden, ist vergiftet und hat Nachteil auf einem von dem Zauberwirker ausgewähltem Attribut

name: Antipathie/Sympathie
materials: Eine Mischung aus Essig und Honig

name: Arkanes Schloss
materials: Goldstaub im Wert von mind. 25GM, den der Zauber verbraucht

name: Astrale Projektion
materials: Für jedes Ziel des Zaubers einen Hyazinth im Wert von mind. 1000GM und einen Silberbarren im Wert von mindestens 100GM - der Zauber verbraucht jeweils beides.

name: Attribut verbessern
desc: Du berührst eine Kreatur und wählst Charisma, Geschicklichkeit, Intelligenz, Stärke oder Weisheit aus. Für die Wirkungsdauer ist das Ziel bei Attributswürfen mit dem ausgewählten Attribut im Vorteil.

name: Auferstehung
materials: Ein Diamant im Wert von mindestens 1000GM, den der Zauber verbraucht

name: Control Flames
desc: You manipulate nonmagical flames, expanding, extinguishing, or altering their properties.

name: Create Bonfire
desc: You create a magical bonfire that damages creatures entering or ending their turn in it.

name: Frostbite
desc: A freezing chill deals damage and imposes disadvantage on the target’s next weapon attack.

name: Gust
desc: You create a small blast of air that can move creatures or objects.

name: Infestation
desc: A cloud of mites and fleas deals poison damage and moves the target randomly.

name: Lightning Lure
desc: You pull a creature toward you with lightning and damage it if within 3 meters.

name: Magic Stone
desc: You enchant up to three pebbles that can be thrown or slung for magical damage.

name: Mold Earth
desc: You manipulate loose earth, moving, shaping, or altering terrain.

name: Primal Savagery
desc: Your teeth or nails become acidic weapons for a melee spell attack.

name: Shape Water
desc: You manipulate water, moving or shaping it and freezing it temporarily.

name: Thunderclap
desc: A burst of thunder damages all creatures within range except you.

name: Toll the Dead
desc: A bell toll damages a creature, dealing more damage if it is already injured.

_template_info: Fill out all keys. Use null or an empty string if not applicable.
name: Absorb Elements
desc: You capture incoming elemental energy, gaining resistance to the triggering damage type and empowering your next melee attack.

name: Catapult
desc: You hurl a loose object at a creature; it deals damage on impact or shatters.

name: Cause Fear
desc: A creature becomes frightened and must flee; it can repeat saves each turn.

name: Ceremony
desc: Performs a religious rite such as wedding, blessing, or dedication with various effects.

name: Chaos Bolt
desc: A chaotic bolt deals random damage types and may leap to another target.

name: Distort Value
desc: You alter how valuable an item appears, doubling or halving its apparent worth.

name: Earth Tremor
desc: The ground shakes, damaging creatures and potentially knocking them prone.

name: Ice Knife
materials: Ein Tropfen Wasser oder ein Stück Eis
desc: A shard of ice strikes a target then explodes, damaging nearby creatures.

name: Snare
desc: Creates a magical trap that restrains and suspends a creature when triggered.

name: Tasha’s Caustic Brew
desc: A stream of acid coats creatures, dealing damage over time until cleaned.

_template_info: Fill out all keys. Use null or an empty string if not applicable.
name: Aganazzar’s Scorcher
desc: A line of roaring flame scorches creatures in its path.

name: Dragon’s Breath
desc: You grant a creature the ability to exhale elemental energy in a cone.

name: Dust Devil
desc: Summons a swirling dust column that damages and pushes creatures.

name: Earthbind
desc: Forces a flying creature to descend and prevents it from flying.

name: Healing Spirit
desc: Summons a spirit that heals creatures that move through its space.

name: Maximilian’s Earthen Grasp
desc: A hand of earth restrains a creature and crushes it.

name: Mind Spike
desc: Deals psychic damage and lets you track the target’s location.

name: Pyrotechnics
desc: Transforms fire into fireworks or smoke that blinds creatures.

name: Shadow Blade
desc: Creates a blade of shadow that deals psychic damage and grants advantage in dim light.

name: Skywrite
desc: Creates large visible words in the sky.

name: Warding Wind
desc: Creates a strong wind that hinders movement, extinguishes flames, and deflects projectiles.

_template_info: Fill out all keys. Use null or an empty string if not applicable.
name: Catnap
desc: Puts willing creatures into a magical sleep that grants benefits of a short rest in 10 minutes.

name: Enemies Abound
desc: The target perceives all creatures as enemies and attacks randomly.

name: Erupting Earth
desc: The ground erupts, dealing damage and creating difficult terrain.

name: Flame Arrows
desc: Enchants ammunition to deal extra fire damage on hits.

name: Melf’s Minute Meteors
desc: Creates orbiting meteors that can be hurled to explode and damage creatures.

name: Summon Lesser Demons
desc: Summons chaotic demons that attack nearby creatures.

name: Summon Fey
desc: Summons a fey spirit that takes a chosen form and obeys commands.

name: Thunder Step
desc: Teleport yourself and an ally, leaving behind a thunderous explosion.

name: Tidal Wave
desc: A wave crashes down, damaging creatures and knocking them prone.

name: Wall of Sand
desc: Creates a wall of swirling sand that heavily obscures and hinders movement.

name: Wall of Water
desc: Creates a wall of water that grants cover and extinguishes flames.

_template_info: Fill out all keys. Use null or an empty string if not applicable.
name: Charm Monster
desc: You attempt to charm a creature; it regards you as a friendly acquaintance.

name: Elemental Bane
desc: Removes resistance to a chosen damage type and causes extra damage when the target takes that type.

name: Find Greater Steed
desc: Summons a powerful spirit steed such as a griffon or pegasus that serves you.

name: Gravity Sinkhole
desc: A crushing gravitational sphere pulls creatures inward and damages them.

name: Private Sanctum
desc: Creates a warded area that blocks sound, vision, teleportation, and planar travel.

name: Sickening Radiance
desc: A glowing area damages creatures and causes exhaustion on failed saves.

name: Storm Sphere
desc: Creates a storm that damages creatures and allows lightning attacks as a bonus action.

name: Vitriolic Sphere
desc: An acid explosion deals immediate and delayed damage.

name: Wall of Ice
desc: Creates a wall of ice that damages creatures when formed or broken.

_template_info: Fill out all keys. Use null or an empty string if not applicable.
name: Control Winds
desc: You manipulate wind in a large area, creating gusts, downdrafts, or updrafts.

name: Danse Macabre
desc: Animates multiple corpses into undead that obey your commands.

name: Dawn
desc: Creates a radiant cylinder of sunlight that damages creatures each round.

name: Enervation
desc: A beam drains life energy each turn and heals you for half the damage dealt.

name: Far Step
desc: Allows repeated teleportation as a bonus action each round.

name: Holy Weapon
desc: Imbues a weapon with radiant power and can release a blinding burst.

name: Immolation
desc: Engulfs a creature in flames, dealing ongoing fire damage.

name: Infernal Calling
materials: Ein Rubin im Wert von 999 GM
desc: Summons a devil that may obey your commands depending on your control.

name: Negative Energy Flood
desc: Deals necrotic damage; slain humanoids rise as zombies.

name: Skill Empowerment
desc: Grants expertise in a chosen skill for the duration.

name: Steel Wind Strike
desc: Teleport between targets, striking multiple creatures with force damage.

name: Synaptic Static
desc: Psychic explosion damages and hampers affected creatures' mental abilities.

name: Transmute Rock
desc: Transforms rock into mud or vice versa, restraining creatures or altering terrain.

_template_info: Fill out all keys. Use null or an empty string if not applicable.
name: Bones of the Earth
desc: Pillars of stone erupt from the ground, lifting creatures and forming terrain.

name: Chain Lightning
materials: Ein Stück Fell und ein Glasstab
desc: A bolt of lightning arcs to multiple targets, dealing heavy lightning damage.

name: Circle of Death
desc: A sphere of negative energy drains life from creatures in a large area.

name: Create Homunculus
materials: Edelsteine im Wert von 1000 GM und Blut
desc: Creates a magical homunculus servant bound to you.

name: Disintegrate
desc: A green ray disintegrates a creature or object entirely if reduced to 0 HP.

name: Investiture of Flame
desc: You gain fire immunity and can emit damaging flames each turn.

name: Investiture of Ice
desc: You gain cold immunity and can freeze terrain and damage enemies.

name: Investiture of Stone
desc: Grants resistance, earth movement, and defensive stone-based abilities.

name: Investiture of Wind
desc: Grants flight, ranged attack disadvantage against you, and wind-based attacks.

name: Mental Prison
desc: Traps a creature in an illusory prison that damages it if it tries to escape.

name: Move Earth
desc: Reshapes terrain by moving large amounts of earth over time.

name: Sunbeam
desc: A beam of radiant light damages and blinds creatures each turn.
